title: BEM-848 fail closed writer
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['scripts','.github/workflows','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 11:44 (UTC+3)'
writer=Path('scripts/ensure_claude_response_file.py')
writer.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env python3\nimport json\nimport sys\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone\nfrom pathlib import Path\nSEP="\\n"\nKYIV=timezone(timedelta(hours=3))\noutcome=sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv)>1 else "unknown"\nresp=Path("governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem844_claude_response.md")\nnow=datetime.now(KYIV).strftime("%Y-%m-%d | %H:%M (UTC+3)")\nif resp.exists() and "CLAUDE RESPONSE | BEM-844" in resp.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore"):\n    print(json.dumps({"status":"real_response_exists","path":str(resp)},ensure_ascii=False))\nelse:\n    resp.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)\n    resp.write_text("# CLAUDE RESPONSE | BEM-844"+SEP+SEP+"Date: "+now+SEP+"Decision: BLOCKED"+SEP+"Reason: Claude action did not produce the required response file. Outcome="+outcome+SEP+"This is a fail-closed runtime result from the Claude dispatcher workflow, not an architecture approval."+SEP,encoding="utf-8")\n    print(json.dumps({"status":"fail_closed_response_written","path":str(resp),"outcome":outcome},ensure_ascii=False))\n''')
wf=Path('.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml')
changed_wf=False
if wf.exists():
    txt=wf.read_text(errors='ignore')
    if 'scripts/ensure_claude_response_file.py' not in txt:
        insert='''\n      - name: Ensure Claude response file exists\n        if: steps.active_check.outputs.active == 'true' && always()\n        env:\n          CLAUDE_OUTCOME: ${{ steps.claude_response.outcome }}\n        run: python3 scripts/ensure_claude_response_file.py "$CLAUDE_OUTCOME"\n'''
        marker='      - name: Record dispatcher completion'
        if marker in txt:
            txt=txt.replace(marker,insert+marker,1)
        else:
            txt=txt+insert
        wf.write_text(txt)
        changed_wf=True
q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem848_fail_closed_response_dispatch.json')
q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v13','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-848 dispatch after installing fail-closed response writer','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-848','status':'fail_closed_response_writer_installed_and_dispatch_queued','writer':str(writer),'workflow_changed':changed_wf,'queue_file':str(q),'next_action':'fresh tick then verify bem844_claude_response.md exists with real or fail-closed BLOCKED result','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem848_install_fail_closed_claude_response_writer.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem848_install_fail_closed_claude_response_writer.md').write_text('# BEM-848 | Install Fail Closed Claude Response Writer | INSTALLED'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem848_next.md').write_text('Next: fresh tick and verify bem844_claude_response.md. Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-848'+sep+sep+'Status: fail_closed_response_writer_installed_and_dispatch_queued'+sep+'Next: tick and verify response file.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem848_install_fail_closed_claude_response_writer.json','governance/reports/bem848_install_fail_closed_claude_response_writer.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem848_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl',str(writer),str(q)]
if changed_wf: changed.append(str(wf))
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Installed fail-closed Claude response writer in dispatcher workflow and queued dispatcher retry so missing Claude output becomes explicit BLOCKED evidence instead of silence')
